rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MYRNA LEE KIZER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Distribution Of R.A.Wilson'S Share Of This Estate To His Heirs, J. Wilson Rediger And T. D. Wilson; Points And Authorities.
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners Julie Wilson Rediger and Timothy Wilson's Motion to Compel Distribution is off calendar as requesting inappropriate relief. Petitioners' request for relief is improperly brought as a law and motion matter rather than a probate petition. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must so advise all other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Tuesday, April 7, 2015. Counsel for the Administrator is directed to submit a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling.
